title: ScoredJobPosting
description: Schema for scraped job postings enriched with pre-filter location routing and AI skills fit alignment analysis.

source.description: The platform source of the job listing (e.g., 'sel', 'linkedin').

source_job_id.description: The unique job identifier assigned by the source platform.

source_url.description: Direct canonical URL link to the original job posting.

title.description: Job title as specified by the employer.

company.description: The company or organization hiring for the position.

location.description: Text description of the location from the posting.

posted_at.description: The date the job was posted, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.

description.description: Full, unfiltered markdown or raw text body of the job description.

scraped_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the job was ingested.

scrub_counts.description: Metrics capturing the reduction or masking of PII.

search_params.description: Arbitrary key-value parameters passed to the scraper query engine.

dedup_hash.description: Deterministic SHA-256 hash generated to deduplicate incoming data frames.

_prefilter_reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why the prefilter classification was made.

_prefilter_metadata.description: Tracing parameters detailing pipeline ingestion state, config file revisions, and geo rules.

_skills_fit_score.description: LLM evaluation score matching the candidate profile to the job description requirements.

_skills_fit_confidence.description: The model's internal self-assessed evaluation confidence level.

_skills_fit_rationale.description: Comprehensive qualitative summary explaining the computed skills score.

_skills_fit_top_matches.description: Key elements of strong overlap between the candidate's core competencies and the job specifications.

_skills_fit_gaps.description: Identified discrepancies, missing framework knowledge, or career alignment gaps.

_skills_fit_hard_concerns.description: Strict prerequisites, structural mismatches, or critical red-flag factors.

_skills_fit_input_source.description: Identifier tracking which candidate configuration or profile vector was used.

_skills_fit_analysis.description: The raw structured payload returned from the LLM parsing block.

_skills_fit_metadata.description: Operational run-state data tracking model strings, hyper-parameters, timestamps, and active prompt versions.
